title: Office Hours Change Announcement
transcript: I want to let everyone know that my office hours will be changing. Starting next week, I will be available on Mondays and Wednesdays from 2 to 4 p.m., instead of the current 1 to 3 p.m. If you have an urgent need to meet with me and these times don't work for you, please email me and I can schedule an appointment. Keep in mind that office hours are a great opportunity to discuss any questions or concerns you have about the course material.

questions.stem: What is the main topic of the announcement?
options: The process for making an appointment
questions.explanation: The announcement is about office hours changing from 1-3 p.m. to 2-4 p.m., which is a revision to a schedule.

questions.stem: What does the professor encourage students to do?
options: Begin planning their schedule for next semester
Meet with her if they have questions
Email her a list of their concerns
questions.explanation: The professor says office hours are a great opportunity to discuss any questions about the course, encouraging students to meet with her.

Keep in mind that office hours are a great opportunity to discuss any questions or concerns you have about the course material.
